# Ben Zachara — DevOps Engineer (Full Context)

> This is the extended LLM context file for zachara.dev. It contains the complete resume, project details, and technical background for Ben Zachara.

## About

Ben Zachara is an infrastructure-focused DevOps engineer with hands-on experience in container orchestration, CI/CD pipelines, and self-hosted cloud infrastructure. Passionate about automation, reliability, and building practical systems that can be deployed and operated end to end.

## Skills

### Containers & Orchestration
Docker, Kubernetes, K3s, containerd

### CI/CD
GitHub Actions, GHCR

### Cloud Platforms
Oracle Cloud, AWS, Azure

### Networking & Security
Traefik, Tailscale, UFW, fail2ban

### Scripting & Languages
Bash, Python, TypeScript, YAML

## Experience

### DevOps Engineer — Self-Directed Projects (2024 — Present)
- Built and maintained a K3s cluster on an Ubuntu-based Oracle Cloud VPS with Traefik ingress
- Designed CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions for container builds and GHCR publishing
- Secured host and admin access with Tailscale, UFW, fail2ban, and SSH keys
- Automated maintenance tasks with Bash scripts, cron, and systemd timers
- Containerized applications with Docker using multi-stage builds and security best practices

### Technical Support & Systems Administration (Previous Role)
- Managed Linux servers and networking infrastructure
- Automated routine tasks with Bash and Python scripts
- Troubleshot complex system issues across distributed environments

## Education & Certifications

### University of Information Technology and Management in Rzeszów
Expected March 2028

### Continuous Self-Directed Learning
Cloud architecture, Kubernetes administration, infrastructure as code, and DevOps practices through hands-on projects, labs, and industry documentation.

### Pursuing
AWS Solutions Architect · CKA (Certified Kubernetes Administrator)

## Projects

### zachara-dev
This portfolio site — built with Astro, TypeScript, and Bun, then pre-rendered to static HTML at build time. GitHub Actions builds a Docker image and publishes it to GHCR for deployment on K3s behind Traefik.
- Tech: Astro, TypeScript, Bun, Docker, K3s, GitHub Actions
- GitHub: https://github.com/benzac708/zachara-dev

### vps-infrastructure
Self-hosted Ubuntu Oracle Cloud VPS running K3s and multiple containerized applications. It uses Traefik for ingress, Tailscale for secure access, UFW and fail2ban for host security, and shell automation for routine maintenance.
- Tech: K3s, Traefik, Tailscale, UFW, fail2ban, Oracle Cloud

### cloud-app
Application deployment example using Docker, K3s, health checks, and Traefik ingress routing. Focused on a simple production-style path from container build to live service.
- Tech: K3s, Docker, Traefik, Python
- GitHub: https://github.com/benzac708/cloud-app

### aws-lab
AWS infrastructure lab environment for hands-on practice with cloud services. VPC networking, EC2 instances, S3 storage, IAM policies, and CloudFormation templates.
- Tech: AWS, CloudFormation, VPC, IAM, EC2
- GitHub: https://github.com/benzac708/aws-lab

### terraform-localstack
Terraform modules tested against LocalStack for local AWS development. Provisions S3 buckets, DynamoDB tables, Lambda functions, and API Gateway endpoints without cloud costs.
- Tech: Terraform, LocalStack, AWS, S3, Lambda
- GitHub: https://github.com/benzac708/terraform-localstack

## Infrastructure

This site is built with Astro, TypeScript, and Bun, styled with TailwindCSS v4, and deployed on a K3s cluster on Oracle Cloud. Traffic flows through Traefik ingress. CI/CD via GitHub Actions builds Docker images and publishes them to GHCR.

## Contact

- Email: bernard@zachara.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/benzac708
- Website: https://zachara.dev
